summary: Frontend-only testing for INVEST acquisition page UX simplification (iter41). Comprehensive Playwright validation on /invest/asset/demo covered: cinematic intro readiness, AcquisitionHero (12 testid children), WhyVerdict (3 advisor bullets with correct kickers), FullAnalysisHeader divider, all 11 AccordionSection wrappers under invest-acc-* prefix (collapsed by default with summaries visible / bodies absent), Strategy accordion expand/collapse toggling WWVDPanel + 3 conviction cards, BetterDeals defaultOpen for PASS verdict, and PASS primary CTA navigating to /invest. Verdict mapping (PASS) confirmed in opener preview chip, hero badge, WWVD card 0 ('PASS' label) and CTA ('Find better deals'). Regression routes /, /pricing, /portfolio/demo, /dashboard/demo, /operate, /invest/asset/manual all render. 57/57 assertions PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: AcquisitionHero CTA color contrast logic at line 226-227 has identical branches for both conditions ('#0E0907' both ways) — dead conditional. Consider simplifying or fixing intent (BUY/NEGOTIATE on dark theme.color may want light text).
AccordionSection body uses inline animation 'inv-fade-in 320ms ease' which depends on a global @keyframes — verify keyframe is loaded before first paint to avoid first-render flash.
InvestDashboard renders 11 AccordionSection components inline with verbose duplication — could be DRY'd into a config-driven map for maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter41 INVEST UX refactor passes all assertions. Hero has 12 testids, Why has 6 (3 cards x 2 testids), Full Analysis header has 1 testid, 11 accordion sections each with 3 testids (-toggle, -summary, plus the section itself, and -body when open). Use data-ready='true' wait on invest-opener-continue-btn for cinematic intro. PASS verdict drives BetterDeals defaultOpen=true. Verdict text propagates correctly through opener preview, hero badge, WWVD card 0. Regression routes all healthy. Backend not modified.
